title: Base to activate B20 standard for stablecoins, RWAs and other tokens
summary: Base to activate B20 standard for stablecoins, RWAs and other tokens
briefing: Base is scheduled to activate its B20 token standard on Wednesday at 6 pm UTC, allowing developers to begin creating native tokens on the network.

title: EU to again vote to extend ‘chat control’ rules
summary: EU to again vote to extend ‘chat control’ rules
briefing: So-called “chat control” rules could be revived in the EU, with lawmakers again set to vote on the legislation Thursday.

title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
summary: Here’s what happened in crypto today
briefing: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

title: StarkWare CEO suggests 4% annual Bitcoin inflation to replace 21M cap
summary: StarkWare CEO suggests 4% annual Bitcoin inflation to replace 21M cap
briefing: StarkWare CEO Eli Ben-Sasson argued that Bitcoin private keys get lost over time, meaning the amount of usable Bitcoin will diminish. Many disagree.

title: Swyftx eyes crypto payments after securing Australian license
summary: Swyftx eyes crypto payments after securing Australian license
briefing: Swyftx interim co-CEO Andrea Yuen says the company "won’t be a pure crypto spot exchange in future,” after it secured a license allowing it to offer payment services.

title: Secret Network cites AI exploit risks in proposed Arbitrum move
summary: Secret Network cites AI exploit risks in proposed Arbitrum move
briefing: “The security risk is the part we take most seriously,” the team said, citing old code and AI exploit risks.

title: CFTC charges commodity, crypto pool operator with $14M fraud
summary: CFTC charges commodity, crypto pool operator with $14M fraud
briefing: The CFTC has launched a rare crypto-related enforcement action against a commodity pool operator that allegedly defrauded investors of more than $14 million.

title: Strike launches ‘volatility-proof’ Bitcoin loans amid bear market, but at a cost
summary: Strike launches ‘volatility-proof’ Bitcoin loans amid bear market, but at a cost
briefing: The cost of eliminating margin calls and forced liquidations is an interest rate as high as 14.2% and an obligation to pay on time, Strike CEO Jack Mallers said.

title: Anthropic Removes Hidden Claude Code Tracker After Researchers Raise Privacy Concerns
summary: Anthropic Removes Hidden Claude Code Tracker After Researchers Raise Privacy Concerns
briefing: The company says the tool was designed to stop abuse and AI model extraction, but critics questioned the use of undisclosed monitoring.

title: SEC's Long-Promised Crypto Safe Harbor to Be Introduced as Soon as This Month
summary: SEC's Long-Promised Crypto Safe Harbor to Be Introduced as Soon as This Month
briefing: The SEC updated its agenda to indicate that a key crypto rulemaking is slated to be released for public comment in July.

title: Tether Invests $20 Million in Mercado Bitcoin to Fuel Expansion Across Latin America
summary: Tether Invests $20 Million in Mercado Bitcoin to Fuel Expansion Across Latin America
briefing: Brazilian crypto exchange Mercado Bitcoin has raised $20 million in fresh investment from USDT stablecoin issuer Tether.

title: AI Is Changing the Workplace and Universities Aren’t Keeping Up, Study Warns
summary: AI Is Changing the Workplace and Universities Aren’t Keeping Up, Study Warns
briefing: A University of Manchester researcher says schools should move beyond AI cheating concerns and prepare graduates for workplaces increasingly shaped by automation.

title: BIG3 NFT Buyers Sue Ice Cube's Basketball League Over Alleged Unfulfilled Promises
summary: BIG3 NFT Buyers Sue Ice Cube's Basketball League Over Alleged Unfulfilled Promises
briefing: Investors who purchased BIG3 NFTs expected the perks of team ownership, but allege "deceptive, fraudulent" marketing was at play.

title: China May Be Following US Lead With Quiet Crackdown on AI Exports
summary: China May Be Following US Lead With Quiet Crackdown on AI Exports
briefing: China is reportedly building the same power to cut off its AI that the US deployed against Anthropic in June.

title: Radar Chat Wants to Make Sending Bitcoin as Easy as Firing Off a Text
summary: Radar Chat Wants to Make Sending Bitcoin as Easy as Firing Off a Text
briefing: Built on Signal’s open-source technology, Radar Chat combines encrypted messaging with self-custodial Bitcoin payments via Lightning Network.

title: Kenya's Markets Regulator Seeks Blockchain Tool to Track Crypto Crime
summary: Kenya's Markets Regulator Seeks Blockchain Tool to Track Crypto Crime
briefing: The Capital Markets Authority wants to monitor over 20 blockchains for fraud, laundering, and sanctions evasion under Kenya's new crypto law.
